description.value: **Benefit:** When you ambush an enemy or enemies that are unaware of your presence, you can roll a Stealth check with a â5 penalty. The result indicates the Perception DC to hear your attacks (rather than the normal DC of â10 to hear pitched combat) until an opponent’s first action, when the DC returns to â10. Other enemies present can still see the attack; Quiet Death only prevents the sounds of battle from alerting further enemies.
